scripts.text:
declare @adj_count int
SELECT @adj_count = COUNT(*) 
FROM dbo.Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType_Failed_SQL_Validation

-------------------------------------------------
-- return results
-------------------------------------------------
select Count_Incorrect_Adj_Type_Cd= @adj_count

update Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType
set BusinessUnit_CD = REPLACE (BusinessUnit_CD, ',', ' ') 
where CHARINDEX(',', BusinessUnit_CD) >0
Go

update Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType
set Currency = REPLACE (Currency, ',', ' ') 
where CHARINDEX(',', Currency) >0
Go

update Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType
set Comments = REPLACE (Comments, ',', ' ') 
where CHARINDEX(',', Comments) >0
Go

UPDATE [SalesAdjust].[dbo].[Finance_Other_Adj_SalesType]
SET  Comments = 'GL ADJ Comment'
WHERE Comments IS NULL or Comments =''
Go
